query:
SELECT 
  c.name as cityName,
  pc.expenseCoverage,
  pc.profitRatioStage1Partner as costShareRatio
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'ę³‰å·˛';
